creator: draco@marino.st
text:
finance/skrooge distfile has disappeared upstream (version 1.4.0), which has had a couple of releases since then.

Moving to version 1.6.0 is a one-line modification + new distinfo generation.

Fix: 

Change portversion from 1.4.0 to 1.6.0 and regenerate distinfo.

To see patches, visit:
https://github.com/jrmarino/DeltaPorts/commit/8db50f97b33ee25c72d694b0b62cc6ca98ede12f
